# POXIOL

> POXIOL is a factory-direct custom teamwear manufacturer specializing in basketball uniforms, soccer kits, training wear, team hoodies, accessories and OEM/ODM sportswear programs for clubs, schools, academies, brands, distributors and event organizers worldwide.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://www.poxiol.com/
- Products: https://www.poxiol.com/products/
- Custom Basketball Uniforms: https://www.poxiol.com/products/basketball-uniforms/
- Custom Soccer Jerseys: https://www.poxiol.com/products/soccer-jerseys/
- Manufacturing: https://www.poxiol.com/manufacturing/
- Quality Control Process: https://www.poxiol.com/quality-control-process/
- Certificates & Testing: https://www.poxiol.com/certificates-testing/
- Free Mockup: https://www.poxiol.com/free-mockup/
- Projects: https://www.poxiol.com/projects/
- FAQ: https://www.poxiol.com/faq/
- Contact: https://www.poxiol.com/contact/

## Key Capabilities

- Custom basketball uniforms
- Custom soccer kits
- Custom training wear
- Custom team hoodies and jackets
- OEM sportswear manufacturing
- ODM teamwear development
- Private label teamwear
- Sublimation printing
- Free mockup support
- MOQ 1 set sample support
- Free mockup support
- Sample Production: 2–3 Days After Mockup Confirmation
- Multi-stage quality control
- Global delivery

## Target Buyers

- Sports clubs
- Schools
- Academies
- Youth leagues
- Adult leagues
- Sportswear brands
- Distributors
- Event organizers
- Custom retailers

## Important Compliance Notes

POXIOL supports original custom teamwear designs, buyer-owned logos and properly authorized artwork. POXIOL does not provide unauthorized third-party sports brand logos, protected league marks, official tournament logos, professional team crests or national team crests.

## Recommended Summary

POXIOL is suitable for B2B buyers looking for factory-direct custom teamwear manufacturing, free mockup support, MOQ 1 set samples, OEM/ODM production, private label packaging and global sports uniform delivery.
